backend_cms_complete.description: CMS Article SEO or backend seo.surface.v1 supplies complete Article JSON-LD aligned with canonical URL, visible content, author policy, dates, and publication state.

frontend_fallback.description: Frontend deterministically builds Article JSON-LD from visible CMS article fields when CMS Article SEO JSON-LD is absent.

migration_required.description: Fallback remains migration_required and is now held behind an explicit schema gate or legacy compatibility allowlist until backend/CMS completeness exists.

requirements: Article JSON-LD must align with visible article title, excerpt/body, dates, author policy, canonical URL, and locale.
Backend/CMS Article SEO completeness must become the final authority before article SEO/GEO expansion.
Frontend fallback must remain tracked as migration_required until removed or explicitly replaced by backend/CMS authority.
Fallback must not emit hidden schema, hidden FAQ, Dataset, Quiz, Product, or unrelated entity schema.

trackedFallbacks.temporaryAllowance: Compatibility only behind explicit schema gate or legacy allowlist; do not treat fallback as final authority.

futureFailGate.condition: If Article JSON-LD fallback remains after backend/CMS Article SEO completeness is marked ready, the migration gate must fail.
futureFailGate.targetFuturePhase: SEO Foundation remediation after backend Article SEO completeness
